title: Xtra Gooey Argentinian Gobo Burdock Stew
description: A funky and gooey Argentinian dish featuring gobo-burdock, perfect for a hangover cure, this low-calorie-friendly stew is simmered to perfection. It combines the earthy flavors of gobo and burdock with the richness of beef broth.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced gobo and burdock root and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the beef broth, tomato paste, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to puree the stew until it is partially smooth.
Simmer the stew for an additional 10 minutes, or until it has reached the desired consistency.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
